% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!

5. won_most_medals_in(usa,last_summer_olympic_games) [input(conjecture)]
6. ~won_most_medals_in(usa,last_summer_olympic_games) [negated conjecture 5]
7. ~won_most_medals_in(usa,last_summer_olympic_games) [flattening 6]
9. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (won_most_medals_in(X2,X0) | (~location(X0,X1) | ~won_most_medals_in(X2,X1))) [ennf transformation 4]
10. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (won_most_medals_in(X2,X0) | ~location(X0,X1) | ~won_most_medals_in(X2,X1)) [flattening 9]
11. location(last_summer_olympic_games,tokyo) [cnf transformation 2]
12. won_most_medals_in(usa,tokyo) [cnf transformation 3]
13. ~won_most_medals_in(X2,X1) | ~location(X0,X1) | won_most_medals_in(X2,X0) [cnf transformation 10]
14. ~won_most_medals_in(usa,last_summer_olympic_games) [cnf transformation 7]
15. ~location(X0,tokyo) | won_most_medals_in(usa,X0) [resolution 13,12]
16. won_most_medals_in(usa,last_summer_olympic_games) [resolution 15,11]
17. $false [forward subsumption resolution 16,14]
% SZS output end Proof for pos.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
